patch.value: pm create <type> <title> --status closed records NO close_reason and emits NO warning under governance.require_close_reason, unlike pm close (errors) and pm update --status closed (defaults + warns). Mirror update: derive close_reason from --message/--resolution else default placeholder, write it, emit close_reason_defaulted warning.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: GH-249 fix: pm create --status closed now honors governance.require_close_reason. When status resolves to the close_status and require_close_reason is enabled, create derives close_reason from --message > --resolution else the CREATE_DIRECT_CLOSE_REASON_DEFAULT placeholder, writes it to front-matter, and pushes a close_reason_defaulted warning when defaulted — mirroring pm update --status closed. Files: cli/commands/create.ts, core/shared/constants.ts.

patch.value: Derive close_reason from --message/--resolution else placeholder; emit close_reason_defaulted.
Closed-at-create honors require_close_reason like the other closure paths
Implemented in create.ts; covered by 4 new create tests.
create --status closed now records a close_reason and warns under governance.require_close_reason, matching pm close and pm update.
